components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(18% 0.02 60); color: oklch(96% 0.012 75); padding: 12px 20px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.18em; border: none; border-radius: 2px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; transition: background 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(58% 0.21 28); } .ds-pip { width: 6px; height: 6px; background: oklch(58% 0.21 28); border-radius: 50%; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover .ds-pip { background: oklch(96% 0.012 75); }

components.name: Technical Section Header
components.css: .ds-section-header { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 16px; width: 100%; } .ds-kicker { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: oklch(48% 0.21 28); } .ds-rule { flex: 1; height: 1px; background: oklch(18% 0.02 60 / 0.15); } .ds-title { font-family: 'Inter Tight', sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(32% 0.02 60); margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: Photon's visual system is designed to convey technical precision and engineering competence. It rejects the soft, generic aesthetic of modern SaaS dashboards in favor of a 'paper and ink' materiality that feels grounded, archival, and permanent.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The primary signal color is used on ≤10% of any given screen.

rules.name: The Material Grid Rule
rules.body: Visual grouping is achieved via hairline borders and background shifts. Shadows are prohibited.

dos: Do use OKLCH for all color declarations.
Do surface technical details using the monospaced Label style.
Do use the 32px grid pattern for background structure.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS 'Stripe-clone' minimalism or soft shadows.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe.
Don't use gradient text or glassmorphism effects.
